Event: Ghost Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 27/01/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: SL6
Fair Fight Sword's soul

Once in a while, the unit covers a random enemy with acid for 4 sec. The unit covered in acid takes 200000 magic damage for 4 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 15% per second for a total of 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 45%, the effect lasts for another 1 sec.

When an enemy is covered with acid, the soul owner removes 2 random buffs from that enemy and deals 160000 physical damage to them. The ability triggers only once per 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Ghost Treasure Hunt

Event date: 27/01/2025

Sage bot code: SL6

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
